form.title: Strategic migration intake
form.description: Start with the primary reason for your inquiry so we can triage your matter correctly.
form.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.successDescription: We have received your submission and will be in touch shortly.

step1.title: What is the primary reason for your inquiry today?
step1.description: Choose the option that best matches your current migration matter.

planning.description: I want to plan a new visa application.

crisis.description: I have received a visa refusal or cancellation.

art.description: I need representation for an ART case.

general.description: I am interested in Australian citizenship or other general advice.

current_visa.title: What is your current visa subclass?

migration_stream.title: What is your primary Migration Stream of interest?

notification_date.title: When did you receive the official notification from the Department?

no_letter.description: I don't have the letter with me right now.

refusal_issue.title: What was the specific issue mentioned in the letter?

gte.description: GTE (Genuine Temporary Entrant) or Genuine Visitor concerns.

financial.description: Financial capacity or fraudulent document claims.

skills.description: Skills Assessment or Work Experience criteria not met.

bridging_visa.title: Are you currently on a Bridging Visa?

substantive.description: No, I still hold a substantive visa.

none.description: No, I have no valid visa at the moment.

education.title: What is your highest level of completed education?

english_level.title: What is your current English language proficiency (IELTS/PTE)?

options.not_tested: I have not taken a test yet.

timeline.title: How soon are you looking to start your application/process?

validation.primaryReasonRequired: Please select a reason before continuing.
validation.currentVisaRequired: Please select your current visa subclass.
validation.notificationDateRequired: Please select when you received the notification.
validation.refusalIssueRequired: Please select the issue mentioned in the letter.
validation.bridgingVisaRequired: Please select your current visa status.
validation.englishLevelRequired: Please select your English proficiency level.
validation.timelineRequired: Please select how soon you want to start.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
